title: Junior Investment Banker at Acuite Ratings Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Junior Investment Banker at Acuite Ratings Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Investment Banker with drive and ambition, Acuite Ratings Holdings Services in Varanasi is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Acuite Ratings Holdings Services:
Acuite Ratings Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct due diligence for mergers, acquisitions, and investments
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in GST

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Acuite Ratings Holdings Services!
